summary: A Go-based CLI tool featuring a test runner, Goss migration translator, and MCP handlers, heavily extended by orchestrated agent-generated tests.
patterns: Test-driven development with extensive extra tests
concerns: High volume of archived/orphaned GOrchestra agent test directories polluting the repository
Untracked files in git status indicating potential configuration drift
Heavy reliance on build ignore tags to manage archived code instead of proper removal
Potential test maintenance burden from numerous *_extra_test.go files
suggestions: Clean up archived GOrchestra agent directories to reduce repository clutter
Resolve the untracked file to maintain a clean working tree
Consolidate extra test files into standard test files where appropriate
Review watch mode config reload logic for edge cases after recent fixes
